item.title: Wanderstop physical edition announced for PS5, Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2

Due out on August 28.

iam8bit, in cooperation with publisher Annapurna Interactive and developer Ivy Road, will release a physical edition of narrative-centric cozy game Wanderstop for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 on August 28, the companies announced.

Wanderstop first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on March 11, 2025, and is coming to Switch 2 and Switch on June 25.

The PlayStation 5 physical edition will cost $39.99, while the Switch 2 physical edition, which includes the full game on the card, will cost $49.99. It will be available at participating retailers, with an iam8bit Exclusive Edition with an exclusive outer sleeve also available via iam8bit’s online store (PlayStation 5, Switch 2) for the same price.

In addition to the physical game, iam8bit will also release the vinyl sets Wanderstop 2xLP and Wanderstop FM 2xLP for $42.99 each. Both are also expected to ship on August 28.

Here is an overview of the game, via iam8bit:

Wanderstop is a narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea.

Playing as a fallen fighter named Alta, you’ll manage a tea shop within a magical forest and tend to the customers who pass through. But Alta does not want to be here. And if she gets her way, the tea shop will be nothing but a brief and painful memory.

Wanderstop is a tea shop management ritual. Grow and harvest the ingredients needed for tea, and then mix them together in an unusual tea-making contraption. Along the way, speak with the many travelers who pass through the shop, learn their stories and make tea that’s just right for them.

In your downtime, you might tidy up around the clearing, decorate the shop in your style, or just sit on a bench with a cup of tea and listen to your own thoughts. Maybe doing nothing at all is okay. The shop demands patience, it rejects those who have come only in the pursuit of growth unchecked.

And that’s why Alta can’t be here. It’s why she’ll never make it. This isn’t who she is. No, she’s a fighter! Why would anyone insist on turning the world’s greatest championship warrior into a docile shopkeeper?! With everything she’s capable of?? No no no, she won’t, she won’t do it… she can’t…

Watch a new trailer below.

iam8bit Exclusive Edition Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/wanderstop-physical-edition-announced-for-ps5-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Abyssus for PS5, Xbox Series launches June 25 alongside version 1.3 update
item.content:encoded:
The brinepunk cooperative first-person shooter.

Brinepunk cooperative first-person shooter Abyssus will launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on June 25 alongside the game’s version 1.3 update, publisher The Arcade Crew and developer DoubleMoose announced. A physical “Brine Edition,” including the base game and four cosmetic downloadable contents, will also be available for PlayStation 5 via distributor Silver Lining Interactive.

Abyssus first launched for PC via Steam on August 12, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Silver Lining Interactive:

About

In Abyssus, players become brinepunk explorers diving into the sunken ruins of an ancient civilization. The goal is simple: claim a massive deposit of brine, a rare and powerful substance. The challenge is anything but. Corrupted denizens rise from the depths, turning your mission into a frantic battle for survival. Teamwork is survival. Up to four players can team up in cooperative play, carefully coordinating loadouts, skills, suits, and weapon mods. Each run is different, offering procedurally sequenced levels that keep every descent fresh and tense.

Key Features

  • Visceral, fast-paced first-person shooter action, with top-notch weapon feel and combat responsiveness.
  • Up to four-players cooperative play.
  • Roguelite meta progression with advancements, rewards, and unlocks.
  • 64 hand-crafted levels, procedurally sequenced to make every run a new experience.
  • Extensive character customization options.
  • 36 different enemies and four bosses that will put your skills to the challenge.
  • …and content arriving this summer with the free 1.3 content patch.

Brine Edition

The physical release comes packed with digital goodies! Here’s what players and collectors alike can expect from the super-charged Abyssus: Brine Edition for PlayStation 5:

  • A copy of the game
  • Downloadable content “Brinehunter” – Show the style and swagger with: Sea-weathered Birdcage Helmet, The Brineston Dance, Sea-weathered Frame
  • Downloadable content “Brineguard” – Show your unwavering commitment to your mission with: Juggernaut Helmet, Juggernaut Suit, Company Loyalty Emote, Brineguard Frame
  • Downloadable content “Brinefrost” – Put on fresh clothes to survive in a cool and charismatic fashion with Polar Helmet, Polar Suit, Brinefrost frame, Bringer of Gifts Emote
  • Downloadable content “Brinerot” – Featuring all new: Brinerotten Helmet & Suit, Pack of Brine emote, and Brinerot Portrait Frame inspired by heavy Brinepunk machinery.

Watch a new trailer below.

Version 1.3 Update and Consoles Release Date Trailer

“Brine Edition” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/abyssus-for-ps5-xbox-series-launches-june-25-alongside-version-1-3-update
